theme: melody that harmonizes with its own echoes
title: Carillon Round: A Melody That Answers Its Own Echoes
strategies: trivial: hold a single drone pitch as long as it stays consonant with its own delayed/transposed echoes (near-zero entropy, but always feasible)
greedy: extend left-to-right, always taking the lowest pitch class consonant with everything already written, no lookahead -- deadlocks (truncates) on sparsely-consonant instances

strong: treat the melody as a walk in the product automaton of the melody's shifted/transposed copies of itself; backtracking search ordered to balance pitch-class usage (entropy) with a 1-step outgoing-edge check to dodge dead states, escaping traps greedy cannot see coming
invalid: emit a pitch class outside [0,11] -- must score 0.0
